ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_management_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider management type */,
  "managing_jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the managing jurisdiction */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the provider address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the provider address */,
  "suburb_town" TEXT /* Suburb or town of the provider address */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postcode of the provider address */,
  "address_state" TEXT /* State of the provider address */,
  "provider_email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "provider_phone_number" INTEGER /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "tax_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the provider */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the provider */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_provider_management_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_management_type_id") REFERENCES provider_management_types ("provider_management_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_providers_managing_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("managing_jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES managing_jurisdictions ("managing_jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_management_types" (
  "provider_management_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider management type */,
  "management_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider management type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider management type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_management_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managing_jurisdictions" (
  "managing_jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each managing jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the managing jurisdiction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("managing_jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_ratings" (
  "service_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service rating */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being rated */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating assigned to the service */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was assigned */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who performed the rating */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations during the rating process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_ratings_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, regulator, provider) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Detailed findings of the inspection */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
